texto: Kissing is something that makes up for a whole lot of the other crap you have to put up with in school, and as a teenager in general
autor: Maureen Johnson Name of the Star
explicacao: Orientação direta de Maureen Johnson Name of the Star sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Kissing is something that makes up for a whole lot of the other crap you have to put up with in s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, ya, kissing, útil em momentos de reflexao.
